body.title: CLOSED: Fix StaleChatLogBackfiller overwriting log with TheIgors-only sessions
body.result: swapped export_chat.py → cc_log_stop_hook.py; TWM obs unconditional; docstring updated
body.description:
StaleChatLogBackfiller in push_sources.py called export_chat.py, which was hardcoded to scan ~/.claude/projects/-home-akien-TheIgors/ — missing all agent_datacenter CC sessions. Running every 5 min, it overwrote the day log with only TheIgors session content, shrinking it from ~1MB to 74K.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (StaleChatLogBackfiller.push() ~line 2762)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite (N/A — no DB changes)
**Scope boundary:** IN: swap export_chat.py call → cc_log_stop_hook.py with cwd=agent_datacenter; make TWM obs unconditional (no 'wrote' string check). OUT: export_chat.py itself; other callers.
**Test plan:** no unit test — observable: stop hook runs produce 815K+ log; backfiller no longer smashes it to 74K. Verified manually.
